selectionMethod: Top herbs from indexability audit ranked by promotable-source coverage (candidateApprovedHits, candidateHits, registryHits, priority)

blockedHerbs.reason: No approved candidates and no registry-backed sources in provided input set; could not build schema-compliant researchEnrichment with real sourceRegistryIds.
No approved candidates and no clearly herb-scoped governed source set in provided candidate wave for claim-level mapping; deferred for human source curation.

notes: All approved source candidates in ops/source-candidates.json were already represented in public/data/source-registry.json.
No indexability gate thresholds or placeholder patterns were modified.
